data.content: Implementation adds selected-agent labels to the Claimed and TAKE terminal log lines in src/lib/terminal-manager.ts, but implementation_review cannot approve because bun test src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-knots-next-guard.test.ts still crashes before running assertions at line 86 with TypeError: vi.importActual is not a function. Add or repair an automated assertion that verifies both log lines include the selected agent label, then rerun the relevant sanity checks.
